[Using mathematical astrological methods birth time should
be rectified]
This realization about birth time rectification methods,
prompts us to search for such methods and ensure the
dependability and correction possibilities provided by them.
Since most of these methods are related to rhythm of day,
first let us have an understanding ab9ut methods they have
used to divide and determine the rhythm of day. Concepts we
will discuss in this section include - Yama, Gulika and
Panchabootodaya. It is just a beginner's section to provide
background information and anyone well-versed in basics can
neglect this section and proceed to next section.
Ahoratra or Vara
Weekdays are in use in India from the ancient past, from
the period of Vedic literature itself. Atharva vediya J yotisha,
